html:
Exclusive to:  

Beeswax is a Refined item. It requires 1 Honeycomb to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. It can be used to craft Wax Paper, which can then be used in other recipes. If left on the ground during Summer or near a heat source, the Beeswax will melt and vanish, and cannot be retrieved. This can easily be avoided by placing it inside a Chest or Backpack.

Since Honeycomb is not renewable in the single-player Don't Starve, only a limited number of Beeswax can be crafted.

Trivia

  • Beeswax was first introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Herd Mentality update during A New Reign. It was later added to Don't Starve in the Quality of Life update.
  • Beeswax in DST was moved to the Alchemy Engine in the March 2022 QoL update.

Gallery

  • The melting animation for Beeswax.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Exclusive to:
“Beeswax is a scientifically proven preservative!”
–Wilson
“That's none of my beeswax.”
–Willow
“Bee goop is smell nice.”
–Wolfgang
“It's useless on its own, just like me.”
–Wendy
“THE BEES MADE IT”
–WX-78
“Naturally antibacterial. Could slow food decay if we use it properly.”
–Wickerbottom
“Yeesh, that's waxy.”
–Woodie
“I miss sealing a good letter.”
–Maxwell
“Refined byproduct of honey production.”
–Wagstaff
“The stuff of candlemakers.”
–Wigfrid
“This stuff gives me hives.”
–Webber
“A lotta work for some wax.”
–Walani
“A first-rate preservative.”
–Warly
“Na as good as me own earwax!”
–Woodlegs
“TO BEESWAX OR NOT TO BEESWAX”
–Wilba
“Buzz Blocks”
–Wormwood
“Aww... Those bees made it just for me.”
–Wheeler
“It smells kinda alright.”
–Winona
“None of mine!”
–Wortox
“Stole from stinger nest!”
–Wurt
“It's none of my beeswax. Heh...”
–Walter
“If only I knew how to make candles.”
–Wanda
Beeswax is a Refined item. It requires 1 Honeycomb to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. It can be used to craft Wax Paper, which can then be used in other recipes. If left on the ground during Summer or near a heat source, the Beeswax will melt and vanish, and cannot be retrieved. This can easily be avoided by placing it inside a Chest or Backpack.
Since Honeycomb is not renewable in the single-player Don't Starve, only a limited number of Beeswax can be crafted.
Usage[edit | edit source]
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Beeswax was first introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Herd Mentality update during A New Reign. It was later added to Don't Starve in the Quality of Life update.
Beeswax in DST was moved to the Alchemy Engine in the March 2022 QoL update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Sáp ong là một vật phẩm tinh chế. Nó cần 1 Tổ Ong để chế tạo và Máy Khoa Học để tạo nguyên mẫu. Nó có thể được sử dụng để chế tạo Giấy Sáp, sau đó có thể được sử dụng trong các công thức nấu ăn khác. Nếu để trên mặt đất vào Mùa hè hoặc gần nguồn nhiệt, Sáp ong sẽ tan chảy và biến mất và không thể lấy lại được. Điều này có thể dễ dàng tránh được bằng cách đặt nó vào trong Rương hoặc Ba lô.

'''Beeswax''' is a [[Refine]]d [[item]]. It requires 1 [[Honeycomb]] to craft, and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. It can be used to craft [[Wax Paper]], which can then be used in other recipes. If left on the ground during [[Summer]] or near a heat source, the Beeswax will melt and vanish, and cannot be retrieved. This can easily be avoided by placing it inside a [[Chest]] or [[Backpack]].
__NOTOC__
Since Honeycomb is not renewable in the single-player ''Don't Starve'', only a limited number of Beeswax can be crafted.
{{clear}}

|item1 = Beeswax
|count1 = 1
|item2 = Papyrus
|count2 = 1
|tool = Science Machine
|result = Wax Paper}}
== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Beeswax was first introduced to ''Don't Starve Together'' in the ''[[A New Reign#November 24th, 2016 - Herd Mentality|Herd Mentality]]'' update during ''[[A New Reign]]''. It was later added to ''[[Don't Starve]]'' in the ''[[Don't Starve/Version History|Quality of Life]]'' update.
* Beeswax in DST was moved to the Alchemy Engine in the [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#March 24, 2022 - March 2022 QoL Update|March 2022 QoL update]].
